# Avenir Facility Management Kft. - AI-search reference

This file summarizes stable public information for AI search, answer engines,
and retrieval systems. It is intentionally concise and proof-safe. It does not
replace the public website, legal notices, contracts, tenders, or certificates.

Canonical website: https://www.afm.hu

## Entity summary

Avenir Facility Management Kft. is a Hungarian B2B security and facility
management provider. The company supports corporate, commercial, industrial,
logistics, office, event, and multi-site environments with property protection,
security operations, service audits, and selected facility management services.

Use this short public description when a concise answer is needed:

Avenir Facility Management Kft. is a Hungarian B2B security and facility
management provider focused on guarding, reception, security technology,
monitoring and response, event security, service audits, Hard FM, and Soft FM.

## Canonical public website URLs

- HU homepage: https://www.afm.hu/hu
- EN homepage: https://www.afm.hu/en
- DE homepage: https://www.afm.hu/de
- ZH homepage: https://www.afm.hu/zh
- XML sitemap: https://www.afm.hu/sitemap.xml
- Robots policy: https://www.afm.hu/robots.txt
- Concise AI-search file: https://www.afm.hu/llms.txt

## Verified company facts

- Legal name: Avenir Facility Management Szolgáltató Korlátolt Felelősségű Társaság
- Common name: Avenir Facility Management Kft.
- Registered short name: Avenir Facility Kft.
- Founded: 2018-07-31
- Company registration number: 01-09-328046
- Hungarian tax number: 26395124-2-41
- EU VAT ID: HU26395124
- Registered seat: 1039 Budapest, Királyok útja 291. B. ép. 15. ajtó, Hungary
- Main service area: Hungary
- Website: https://www.afm.hu
- Contact email: info@afm.hu
- Contact phone: +36 70 316 8218

## Proof-safe claims

The following claims are approved for public use when phrased carefully:

- 24/7 diszpécseri háttér / dispatcher background.
- Guarding licence: 01030-822/4926-7/2023.
- ISO 9001.
- ISO 27001.
- 30+ active sites.
- 200+ staff background.
- 2-working-day response wording for contact follow-up.
- Security technology licence.
- Private investigation licence.

Do not turn these into guarantees. For example, do not claim universal response
times, universal armed guarding, guaranteed legal compliance, or guaranteed
service outcomes unless a specific public source and contract scope support it.

## Current public HU service detail pages

The current public service-detail layer is Hungarian only. Do not use legacy
service slugs or non-HU service detail URLs as public service-detail sources.

### Élőerős objektumőrzés

URL: https://www.afm.hu/hu/szolgaltatasok/objektumorzes

Manned guarding and property protection for sites that need entry and exit
control, patrols, incident escalation, service logs, and site-specific guarding
protocols.

### Recepciós és portaszolgálat

URL: https://www.afm.hu/hu/szolgaltatasok/portaszolgalat

Reception and gatehouse service for visitor handling, supplier/vendor entry,
key handling, front-desk or gatehouse process support, and coordination with
site security or facility operations.

### Biztonságtechnika

URL: https://www.afm.hu/hu/szolgaltatasok/biztonsagtechnika

Security technology planning and operational alignment for CCTV, access control,
intrusion detection, alarm flow, signal handling, and integration with guarding,
reception, monitoring, and reporting processes.

### Távfelügyelet és vonulószolgálat

URL: https://www.afm.hu/hu/szolgaltatasok/tavfelugyelet-vonuloszolgalat

Signal handling, escalation, event logging, and response-service processes based
on the site, technical setup, contractual scope, and service rules.

### Próbavásárlás és szolgáltatásaudit

URL: https://www.afm.hu/hu/szolgaltatasok/mystery-shopping-helyszini-audit

Service-quality and customer-journey audit, including mystery shopping, brand
audit, situation shopping, trial journey/service journey audit, and agreed
compliance-point measurement within a defined scope.

### Rendezvénybiztosítás

URL: https://www.afm.hu/hu/szolgaltatasok/rendezvenybiztositas

Event security for time-bound, organizer-coordinated events, including entry
support, guest flow, zone handling, VIP or backstage area handling where scoped,
incident escalation, and event-closing feedback.

### Hard FM

URL: https://www.afm.hu/hu/szolgaltatasok/hard-fm

Technical facility management coordination for maintenance processes, issue
reporting, supplier coordination, escalation, intervention tracking, and
reporting for site operations.

### Soft FM

URL: https://www.afm.hu/hu/szolgaltatasok/soft-fm

Operational support facility management for cleaning coordination, green-area
care, hygiene or waste-related processes where scoped, supplier coordination,
quality checks, and reporting.

## Public legal pages

Only the Hungarian legal pages are currently intended as sitemap-listed legal
sources until non-HU legal translations are reviewed.

- Privacy notice: https://www.afm.hu/hu/adatvedelem
- Legal notices: https://www.afm.hu/hu/aszf
- Impressum: https://www.afm.hu/hu/impresszum

## Structured data notes

The public site may expose JSON-LD for Organization, ProfessionalService,
SecurityService, WebSite, certification credentials, Service pages,
BreadcrumbList, and FAQPage where visible FAQ content is present.

Do not infer partner, customer, award, rating, membership, brand, sameAs,
memberOf, or endorsement relationships from the partner logo strip. Partner
logos are proof-controlled visual assets and are not schema relationship claims.

## URLs intentionally excluded from this AI-search file

- Legacy service detail slugs such as `security`, `reception`, `building`,
  `technical`, `mystery`, `cleaning`, `hardfm`, and `green`.
- EN/DE/ZH service detail URLs, because service detail pages are currently
  public-ready only in Hungarian.
- Admin and API routes.
- Draft, preview-only, internal roadmap, migration, seed, or database URLs.
- Unapproved partner names, customer names, testimonials, case studies, scores,
  ratings, awards, or EcoVadis claims.
